consumer_contract_boundaries: Consumers should not reconstruct current state from raw records unless doing audit or debug work.
Consumers should not infer live prices from the view model.
Consumers should not execute trades or turn rule text into automation.
Consumers should not treat watch, risk, prohibition, or no-reentry rules as buy or sell automation.
Consumers should preserve warnings, data_quality, source_files, and portfolio_mode in any rendering.
Consumers should treat user-provided broker and Binance screenshots as the execution source of truth.

consumer_specific_readiness.rationale: Reports already consume local runtime records and generated cockpit summaries; view_model.json gives them a safer single-file input.
The view model has stable sections, source references, warnings, and quality flags suitable for a read-only UI prototype.
limits: No masking, role permission, or interaction policy exists yet.
Future UI must be read-only until a separate execution-safety design exists.

consumer_specific_readiness.rationale: The view model can be served as a static payload, but no API endpoint, authentication, authorization, or privacy layer exists.
limits: No external service or live sync should be added in this phase.
API consumers must not mutate runtime records.

consumer_specific_readiness.rationale: The top-level sections are compact enough for mobile cards, but no mobile-specific compression or masking policy exists.
limits: Dense timeline events may need a later compact summary.
Private account values require masking before customer-facing use.

consumer_specific_readiness.rationale: AI Board roles can read the view model for current state, risk roles, rules, and timeline context.
limits: AI Board automation is not implemented.
Any recommendation must still respect Command Intelligence and human execution control.
The view model is not a live market data feed.

consumer_specific_readiness.rationale: The view model shape is useful, but customer-facing use requires privacy masking, permission rules, and copy/interaction design.

privacy_and_safety_review.summary: The current view model is safe for local read-only development consumers, but not yet ready for customer-facing exposure without masking and permission controls.

known_limitations: No user or role permission system exists yet.
No customer-facing privacy masking layer exists yet.
The current view model is single-project / LDD pilot focused.
Multi-project cockpit consumption remains future work.
warnings: Customer-facing use requires privacy masking and permission controls before publication.
Future API consumers need authentication and read-only boundaries before exposure.
recommended_next_phase: Vol.5 Phase 5.6 - Mock Consumer Package / UI Boundary Sample
non_goals: No UI or frontend application is created.
No GitHub Projects board is created.
